name: JOMI
tagline: Product catalog and brand showcase for an industrial supplies company
description: A web application built for JOMI, an industrial supplies company, featuring a product catalog organized by categories and business sectors (rubros). Includes a contact form with email notifications, brand showcase, admin panel for content management, and image uploads via Cloudinary.
highlights: Product catalog with categories, sectors, and brand organization
Admin panel with CRUD for products, categories, sectors, and brands
Contact form with email notifications via Nodemailer
